targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(stock_current * unit_cost_brl), 2) AS "Valor (R$)" FROM materials
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Reposição" FROM materials WHERE stock_current <= reorder_point
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Críticos" FROM materials WHERE stock_current < stock_min
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "PCs" FROM purchase_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('received', 'rejected')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Fornec." FROM suppliers WHERE status = 'active'

panels.title: Classificação ABC — Valor em Estoque por Classe

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'Classe ' || abc_class AS "Classe", ROUND(SUM(stock_current * unit_cost_brl), 2) AS "Valor (R$)" FROM materials GROUP BY abc_class ORDER BY abc_class

panels.title: Estoque vs. Mínimo vs. Ponto Reposição

targets.rawSql: SELECT name AS "Material", stock_current AS "Estoque", reorder_point AS "Pto. Reposição", stock_min AS "Mínimo" FROM materials WHERE abc_class IN ('A', 'B') ORDER BY stock_current::float / NULLIF(reorder_point, 0) ASC

SELECT name AS "Material", CASE WHEN avg_daily_consumption > 0 THEN ROUND(stock_current / avg_daily_consumption, 0) ELSE 999 END AS "Dias" FROM materials WHERE abc_class IN ('A', 'B') ORDER BY stock_current::float / NULLIF(avg_daily_consumption, 0.01) ASC

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, movement_type AS metric, SUM(ABS(quantity)) AS "Quantidade" FROM inventory_movements WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date_trunc('day', created_at), movement_type ORDER BY time

SELECT po.id AS "PC", s.name AS "Fornecedor", m.name AS "Material", po.quantity AS "Qtd", po.unit_price_brl AS "Preço Un.", po.total_brl AS "Total (R$)", po.status AS "Status", po.urgency AS "Urgência", po.expected_delivery AS "Entrega Prev." FROM purchase_orders po JOIN suppliers s ON po.supplier_id = s.id JOIN materials m ON po.material_id = m.id ORDER BY po.order_date DESC

SELECT m.id AS "ID", m.name AS "Material", m.unit AS "Un.", m.abc_class || '/' || m.xyz_class AS "ABC/XYZ", m.category AS "Categoria", m.stock_current AS "Estoque", m.reorder_point AS "Pto. Repos.", m.stock_min AS "Mínimo", m.stock_safety AS "Segurança", m.eoq AS "EOQ", m.unit_cost_brl AS "Custo (R$)", ROUND(m.stock_current * m.unit_cost_brl, 2) AS "Valor (R$)", CASE WHEN m.avg_daily_consumption > 0 THEN ROUND(m.stock_current / m.avg_daily_consumption, 0) ELSE NULL END AS "Dias Cobert.", m.location_warehouse AS "Local", CASE WHEN m.stock_current < m.stock_min THEN 'CRÍTICO' WHEN m.stock_current <= m.reorder_point THEN 'REPOR' ELSE 'OK' END AS "Status" FROM materials m ORDER BY m.abc_class, m.name

SELECT s.id AS "ID", s.name AS "Fornecedor", s.rating AS "Rating", s.lead_time_days AS "Lead Time", s.reliability_pct AS "OTIF %", s.quality_pct AS "Qualidade %", s.price_competitiveness AS "Competitividade", s.payment_terms AS "Pgto", CASE WHEN s.certified_iso THEN 'Sim' ELSE 'Não' END AS "ISO", s.status AS "Status", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier_materials sm WHERE sm.supplier_id = s.id) AS "Materiais" FROM suppliers s ORDER BY s.rating DESC
